action: Knife on logs -> arrow shafts
notes: Owner-verified: knife-on-logs opens the make-menu (multiple products: shafts / shortbow(u) / longbow(u) / crossbow stock by tier). Must key as interface at product click for per-product granularity. CURRENT recipe_nodes keys this item-on-item (Knife/targets=logs) - MIS-KEYED.

action: Knife on logs -> unstrung shortbow
notes: knife-on-logs interface. Produces UNSTRUNG bow, not the strung Shortbow. The 35 collapse strung Shortbow onto this step - conflates two actions. Shortbow(u) has NO card.

action: Knife on logs -> unstrung longbow
notes: knife-on-logs interface. Unstrung. Longbow(u) has NO card.

action: Knife on logs -> crossbow stock
notes: knife-on-logs interface; higher log tiers offer crossbow stock as a product. Stock items ARE carded (wooden/oak/teak/maple/yew/mahogany stock). Not present in the 35.

action: Knife on Achey tree logs -> ogre arrow shaft
notes: knife-on-logs family -> interface (generalises owner-verified). Ogre arrow shaft IS carded. Not present in the 35.

action: Bow string on unstrung shortbow
notes: Owner-verified: stringing opens interface. Separate action from knife-on-logs. The 35 fold this into the knife step. Applies to every bow tier (short & long, normal->magic).

action: Bow string on unstrung longbow
notes: Owner-verified interface. Per tier (normal/oak/willow/maple/yew/magic).

action: Feather on dart tip -> darts
notes: Owner-verified INSTANT (no interface) by DEFAULT. Wiki (5 Apr 2023): players can OPT-IN toggle a Make-x interface for darts. Default = instant -> key item-on-item (CURRENT keying correct). CAVEAT: if a player enables the toggle, dart creation routes through the interface. Dart tips have NO card; dart products ARE carded.

action: Feather on unfinished metal bolts -> bolts
notes: Wiki (31 Jul 2024): 'There is now a Make-X option when fletching bolts.' -> feathering bolts opens the make interface. CURRENT 35 key these item-on-item -> likely need interface twins (cf. the cooking interface-twin fix). UNVERIFIED whether make-X is always-on or an opt-in toggle like darts - owner verify. bolts(unf) NO card; bolt products carded.

action: Feather on arrow shaft -> headless arrow
notes: UNVERIFIED. No Make-X change note on wiki (unlike darts/bolts). Lean INSTANT (item-on-item) - current keying likely correct. Recommend in-game verify. Headless arrow IS carded.
